subject: feat(engine,ux): add variable recurring expenses (usage-based + on-demand)
body:
Support three recurring variability types: fixed (same amount, regular
schedule), variable (different amount, regular schedule), and irregular
(no schedule, bought when needed). Users pick the sub-type during import
classification. Irregular patterns project as a daily rate spread from
historical averages instead of scheduled occurrences.

Tags: recurring, forecast, import, ux, db, engine
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: variable-recurring-expenses
Semver: minor
